title: cabomba caroliniana var. caroliniana
intro: Cabomba caroliniana var. caroliniana, also known as Carolina cabomba, is a plant species belonging to the Cabombaceae family, characterized by its aquatic growth and feathery foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carolina cabomba include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to the affected area or consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
